chapters.title: The Reservation
chapters.content: Emma booked a table at a small Italian restaurant hidden in a quiet street downtown. Everyone said it served the best pasta in the city.

chapters.title: The Perfect Dish
chapters.content: She ordered handmade ravioli with fresh tomato sauce. The first bite was enough to understand why people loved the place so much.

chapters.title: Dessert Decision
chapters.content: Even though she was already full, Emma could not leave without trying the tiramisu. Some decisions are simply correct.
